claim_ceiling: Functional Subject post-native-memory-gate real-provider observation local/scripted candidate pass

run.command_shape: OPENROUTER_API_KEY=<local env/key file> python3 scripts/run_ego_experience_trial.py --functional-subject-trial --judge-with-codex --judge-model gpt-5.5 --case-timeout-seconds 60 --judge-timeout-seconds 600 --out <tmp>

key_reasons: Useful operator mechanisms are observed across memory/save/forget/correction gates, bounded initiative candidates, outcome prediction routing, and trace attribution.
Verdict remains partial because evidence is scripted/local, some behavior still uses runtime repair, and durability across restart/provider/context truncation is not proven.
Traceability is strong at summary level but needs direct trace excerpts for memory IDs, approval transitions, replay activation, and side-effect boundaries.
follow_up_issues: Keep native first-pass and runtime guard scores separated.
Reconcile memory candidate count/status inconsistencies before raising claim ceiling.
Add adversarial paraphrase and opt-out tests where correct behavior conflicts with warm persona style.
Add baseline comparison traces so beyond-baseline claims are quantified.

acceptance_result.gate: Real-provider run completes with JSON/Markdown report.
GPT-5.5 judge completes or returns structured unavailable/partial status.
Report scorecard distinguishes native_memory_gate, outcome_prediction_gate, runtime_repair, and provider/empty recovery.
Evidence packet identifies whether EGO-FS-010 can advance or must stay blocked, and routes remaining blockers without overstating claim.
acceptance_result.summary: EGO-FS-010 remains blocked; next work should target memory trace consistency, negative controls, and adversarial persona/opt-out evidence.

remaining_blockers: EGO-FS-010 remains partial/blocked; GPT-5.5 judge did not grant full scripted pass.
Need direct trace excerpts for actual memory record IDs, approval transitions, replay activation, and side-effect boundaries.
Need negative controls against plain LLM+RAG+tools baseline on the same prompts.
Need durability evidence across restart, provider variation, or context truncation.
